findings.title: Overdue Payment - Venue
findings.why: Payment to Bella Vista Hall was due on 2026-06-01, and only partial payment has been made. This could jeopardize the booking.
findings.do: Contact Bella Vista Hall to settle the remaining balance and ensure the booking is secure.

findings.title: Estimate vs Contracted - Catering
findings.why: Fig & Vine Catering has no committed or paid amount, only a budgeted estimate which is optimistic.
findings.do: Finalize the contract with Fig & Vine Catering and adjust the budget to reflect real costs.

findings.title: High Payment Exposure
findings.why: A significant amount is due before the wedding, leading to a risky financial concentration.
findings.do: Evaluate payment schedules and consider negotiating terms with vendors for more balanced payment distribution.

findings.title: Double Entry - Music
findings.why: Duplicate entries for DJ Amir appear under 'Music', which could result in overpayment.
findings.do: Clarify the payment structure with DJ Amir and ensure only one entry is accurate.

findings.title: Hidden Fees in Photography Contract
findings.why: Golden Hour Photography contract includes a 22% service fee not reflected in budgeted costs.
findings.do: Update the budget to account for the service fee and ensure it aligns with total budget constraints.

findings.title: Missing Contingency Fund and Several Categories
findings.why: No contingency or line items for decor, video, flowers, favors, rings, insurance, and officiant were found, posing a risk of unbudgeted surprises.
findings.do: Review and update the budget to include these missing categories and a 5-10% contingency fund.
